_comment: Schema for configuration.json.  Each leaf key maps to a descriptor.

_descriptor_keys.label: Human-readable field label shown in the UI
_descriptor_keys.unit: Optional unit string appended to the label
_descriptor_keys.default: Value written when creating a fresh configuration.json
_descriptor_keys.env_var: Environment variable this field reads from / writes to (display only)
_descriptor_keys.live: Dotted key emitted via config_changed on save (omit if no live effect)

ca_addr_list.label: CA address list
ca_addr_list.description: Space-separated CA gateway / broadcast addresses (maps to EPICS_CA_ADDR_LIST)

ca_auto_addr.label: CA auto-address
ca_auto_addr.description: Let libca determine the address list automatically (maps to EPICS_CA_AUTO_ADDR_LIST)

pva_addr_list.label: PVA address list
pva_addr_list.description: Space-separated PVA gateway / broadcast addresses (maps to EPICS_PVA_ADDR_LIST)

pva_auto_addr.label: PVA auto-address
pva_auto_addr.description: Let p4p determine the address list automatically (maps to EPICS_PVA_AUTO_ADDR_LIST)

ca_max_array_bytes.label: CA max array bytes
ca_max_array_bytes.description: Maximum waveform payload for Channel Access (maps to EPICS_CA_MAX_ARRAY_BYTES)

pva_provider.label: PVA provider
pva_provider.description: p4p provider name passed to Context()

default_output_dir.label: Output directory
default_output_dir.description: Default directory for scan output files (~ expands to home)

default_prefix.label: File prefix
default_prefix.description: Default filename prefix for new scans

filename_mode.label: Filename mode
filename_mode.description: Whether the file suffix is a zero-padded scan number or a timestamp

auto_increment.label: Auto-increment scan number
auto_increment.description: Automatically increment the scan counter after each run (number mode only)

default_format.label: Default file format
default_format.description: File format selected by default in the DAQ tab

strip_chart_history_s.label: Strip chart history
strip_chart_history_s.description: Number of seconds of data retained in each strip-chart trace buffer

image_rate_limit_hz.label: Image rate limit
image_rate_limit_hz.description: Maximum frame delivery rate from the PVA bridge to the Qt GUI

overlay_opacity_rest.label: Overlay opacity (rest)
overlay_opacity_rest.description: Opacity of motor overlays when the mouse is not over their region

overlay_opacity_hover.label: Overlay opacity (hover)
overlay_opacity_hover.description: Opacity of motor overlays when the mouse is over their region

max_iterations.label: Max iterations
max_iterations.description: Maximum number of Bayesian optimisation steps

init_samples.label: Initial samples
init_samples.description: Number of random initialisation samples before the GP model is fitted

random_seed.label: Random seed
random_seed.description: RNG seed for reproducible optimisation runs (0 = unseeded)

verbose.label: Verbose logging
verbose.description: Print blop progress messages to stdout
